Democracy Institute智庫今天公布最新民調，這份民調是在Trump感染Covid-19之後所做 的調查

全國民調Trump 46% vs. 45%領先Biden，搖擺州差距更大47% vs. 43%

最終選舉人票Trump拿到320，Biden拿到218

Source: https://www.ptt.cc/bbs/Gossiping/M.1601795762.A.12A.html

是日民調：
全國：Trump +1%
佛羅里達州：Trump +4%
明尼蘇達州：Trump +2%
新罕布什爾州：Trump +2%

538 同 realclear 係玩綜合民調，揀幾個再除開。佢哋d民調全部多數做一個星期。但個人認為Rasmussen Reports係最準，取樣最多，右派民調。

replies.msg:
A December 2018 article by political writer and analyst Harry Enten called Rasmussen the least accurate pollster in the 2018 midterm elections after stating Rasmussen had projected the Republicans to come ahead nationally by one point, while at the time Democrats were actually winning the national House vote by 8.6 points—an error of nearly 10 points.[107]

The Associated Press has also addressed Rasmussen's methodology. In 2018, AP journalists noted that Rasmussen's telephone methodology systematically omits adults, many of them young people, without cell phones. The AP also noted that Rasmussen does not provide details regarding its online-panel methodology.[108]

quote.msg:
呢份可能琴日做今日公佈
所以同呢堆有唔同結果
我睇538賓州仲落後緊5趴
538 同 realclear 係玩綜合民調，揀幾個再除開。佢哋d民調全部多數做一個星期。但個人認為Rasmussen Reports係最準，取樣最多，右派民調。

A December 2018 article by political writer and analyst Harry Enten called Rasmussen the least accurate pollster in the 2018 midterm elections after stating Rasmussen had projected the Republicans to come ahead nationally by one point, while at the time Democrats were actually winning the national House vote by 8.6 points—an error of nearly 10 points.[107]

The Associated Press has also addressed Rasmussen's methodology. In 2018, AP journalists noted that Rasmussen's telephone methodology systematically omits adults, many of them young people, without cell phones. The AP also noted that Rasmussen does not provide details regarding its online-panel methodology.[108]
